title: Success story
question: 把今天课文里“小时候的简单技能 -> 多年练习和成长 -> 后来又回到家人朋友的小请求”的线索放进一个自己的生活场景——这一题不打分、老师只会鼓励 + 给一句小建议。把下面 3 个空补完整，用 word bank 里的词或短语。
example_answer: When he was young, he used to repair bicycles. He worked very hard and saved money for years. In a few years, his small workshop had become a larger project. But one day, his family asked him to repair a bicycle again.

options.label: A
options.scenario_zh: 过去习惯：小时候经常做的简单技能
options.english_template: When he was young, he ___ repair bicycles.

options.label: B
options.scenario_zh: 成长过程：几年后，小地方变成更大的项目
options.english_template: In a few years, his small workshop ___ a larger project.

options.label: C
options.scenario_zh: 温暖回环：家人又请他做最早那件小事
options.english_template: But one day, his ___ to repair a bicycle again.
